heading: Expenditure from tribal funds without specific appropriations
label: 123 Expenditure from tribal funds without specific appropriations
text: No money shall be expended from Indian tribal funds without specific appropriation by Congress except as follows: Equalization of allotments, education of Indian children in accordance with existing law, per capita and other payments, all of which are hereby continued in full force and effect: , That this shall not change existing law with reference to the Five Civilized Tribes.Provided
